true /a/b /a%2Fb q=1 frag/part frag%2Fpart
/a%2Fb frag%2Fpart /a%2Fb?q=1
space+key%2Fx%2By%3F%3Dz%26
space key/x+y?=z& true
my%2Fcool+blog&about%2Cstuff
my/cool+blog&about,stuff true
parse "bad\nurl": net/url: invalid control character in URL
invalid URL escape "%zz"
invalid URL escape "%zz"

cases.name: relative resolution and join path behavior stay pinned
cases.expected_native_go_stdout:
https://alice:secret@example.com/a/d/e?x=2
https://cdn.example.com//asset/v1
https://alice:secret@example.com/a/b/c?q=1#next
true https://alice:secret@example.com/g%20h
https://alice:secret@example.com/a/b/c/c%20d/e/f?q=1#base
https://example.com/base/x%20y/z/ true
mailto:alice@example.com
parse "bad\nurl": net/url: invalid control character in URL

cases.name: values userinfo and bound method values match native go
cases.expected_native_go_stdout:
alice@example.com
p@ss:/? true
https://alice%40example.com:p%40ss%3A%2F%3F@example.com/path
https://alice%40example.com:xxxxx@example.com/path
a=1&a=two+words&space+key=x%2By&z=last
1 true false
a=1&a=two+words&space+key=x%2By
